name: Agentic-Law-OS
description: Legal-research plugin pack. Tier-1 intake builds a frozen TaskSpec; the orchestrator dispatches Statute / Verifier / Confidence / Renderer sub-agents and writes a hash-chained claim ledger. The R1-R15 + W1-W4 rule engine fires at every architectural seam (before_tool_call, after_tool_call, before_agent_finalize, message_sending) to refuse rather than fabricate. Consumes the kb_* MCP tools registered via .openclaw/mcp-config.json. See docs/legal/PRD-OPENCLAW-FORK.md.

company_context_path.description: Path (relative to repo root) to the active Company Context Pack. Operator may override per-deployment.

source_profile.description: Default source profile for runs that do not specify one. Profile B (Lexis-free) is the v1 default per PRD §8.

default_jurisdictions.description: Default jurisdiction lock when intake cannot infer one from the requester message.

rule_profile.description: Rule-engine enforcement mode. 'strict' is production. 'permissive-dev' downgrades blocking rules to warnings for local development; never use in production.

database_url_env.description: Environment variable holding the Postgres connection string for the claim ledger and retrieval log. Same DB as the KB corpus.

command.description: Command used to launch the kb-mcp server registered in .openclaw/mcp-config.json.

args.description: Arguments passed to the kb-mcp command. Default points at the workspace-local build output.
